requirement_topic.en: Lithium cell safety baseline and O’zDSt alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯安全基线与O’zDSt衔接
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯安全基線與O’zDSt銜接

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are expected to meet safety requirements referencing O’zDSt standards adopted from IEC/GOST families. In practice, Uzbek authorities and import procedures focus on product documentation and importer responsibility in addition to test outcomes, and safety documentation is commonly reviewed with the in-country importer acting as the compliance contact.
summary.zh: 锂电池与移动电源通常要求符合O’zDSt体系标准，且该体系多数以IEC/GOST家族为基础。乌兹别克斯坦市场通常结合进口商责任对产品文件进行审核，安全测试结果常作为技术证据，由本地进口商承担合规对接。
summary.zht: 鋰電池與行動電源通常要求符合O’zDSt體系標準，且該體系多以IEC/GOST家族為基礎。烏茲別克斯坦市場通常結合進口商責任對產品文件進行審核，安全測試結果常作為技術證據，由本地進口商承擔合規對接。

standards_or_laws: O’zDSt references for lithium battery safety derived from IEC framework
IEC 62133-2 harmonised safety principles for portable lithium cells and batteries (as technical benchmark)

summary.en: China primarily references GB 31241-2022 and related domestic test practice for portable sealed secondary lithium batteries, with CCC where applicable. These are strong baseline test references but are Chinese domestic controls and do not automatically satisfy Uzbek importer-facing documentation logic.
summary.zh: 中国主要以GB 31241-2022及相关国内试验做法为便携式密封二次锂电池的依据，部分产品还需要CCC。它们是有价值的技术起点，但不能自动覆盖乌兹别克斯坦进口商端的文件审查逻辑。
summary.zht: 中國主要以GB 31241-2022及相關國內試驗做法為便攜式密封二次鋰電池之依據，部分產品還需要CCC。它們是有價值的技術起點，但不能自動覆蓋烏茲別克斯坦進口商端的文件審查邏輯。

standards_or_laws: CCC where applicable under Chinese domestic market regime

gap.en: Technical test methods are largely comparable, but the compliance pathway differs because Uzbekistan depends on national importer-linked verification and O’zDSt references rather than direct reliance on Chinese certificates. Exporters should map test reports to Uzbek document expectations before shipment.
gap.zh: 测试方法层面有可比性，但合规路径不同，乌兹别克斯坦更依赖国家进口商关联的审核与O’zDSt指向文本，而不是直接承接中国证书。出口商应在出货前将测试报告映射到乌兹别克斯坦文件要求。
gap.zht: 測試方法層面有可比性，但合規路徑不同，烏茲別克斯坦更依賴國家進口商關聯的審核與O’zDSt指向文本，而非直接承接中國證書。出口商應在出貨前將測試報告映射到烏茲別克斯坦文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where national implementation classifies the product class within regulated lithium import scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic China products in applicable GB and CCC categories; not automatically accepted as Uzbek market-access proof.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 31241 baseline and CCC documentation are valuable for technical pre-checking, but Uzbekistan typically needs local importer-side confirmation and O’zDSt-aligned documentation package. Exporters should maintain one technical file with language and legal mapping prepared for Uzbek customs and testing review points.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 31241和CCC文件对技术预审很有价值，但乌兹别克斯坦通常仍需要当地进口商确认及O’zDSt对齐文件包。出口商应保留用于乌兹别克报关与审核的技术文件和合规映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 31241和CCC文件對技術預審很有價值，但烏茲別克斯坦通常仍需要當地進口商確認及O’zDSt對齊文件包。出口商應保留用於烏茲別克報關與審核的技術文件和合規映射。
